extension.summary: Single-addon Kolop skin with CSFD rankings built in
Skin Kolop ktoremu staci jeden addon a obsahuje CSFD rebricky
Skin Kolop kteremu staci jeden addon a obsahuje CSFD zebricky
extension.description: A Kodi skin for Lolop CS that bundles Stream Cinema sources and CSFD rankings into one required addon (plugin.video.lolop.cs). Faster startup and no need to install separate Kolop and CSFD addons.
Kodi skin pre Lolop CS ktory spaja Stream Cinema zdroje a CSFD rebricky do jedineho povinneho addonu (plugin.video.lolop.cs). Rychlejsi start a netreba samostatne instalovat Kolop a CSFD addony.
Kodi skin pro Lolop CS ktery spojuje Stream Cinema zdroje a CSFD zebricky do jedineho povinneho addonu (plugin.video.lolop.cs). Rychlejsi start a netreba samostatne instalovat Kolop a CSFD addony.
extension.news: v1.0.0 (2026-04-25) - Initial release based on skin.kolop - Switched all widget URLs to the new combined plugin.video.lolop.cs addon - Removed dependency on separate plugin.video.kolop and plugin.video.csfd-rebricek
